heading_content_part: Updated: 22 Feburary 2020Cashzine is an information aggregator inclusive of multiple categories for our users to read every day, in order to assist them in developing a good reading habit. This Guideline will explain how Cashzine collects, uses and stores your personal information, along with the rights you are entitled to. We will use this Guideline to explain the relevant details, including the following:

decoder_heading: Updated: 22 February 2020
ident_heading: Updated: 22 Feburary 2020
heading_content_part: i. We will describe the types of personal information we collect and their corresponding use in order for you to understand how we collect specific types of personal information for a particular function, the reasons for its use and the methods of such collection.

decoder_heading: Updated: 22 February 2020
ident_heading: Updated: 22 Feburary 2020
heading_content_part: ii. Whilst using some features, we will collect your personal information after obtaining your consent. For example, when you use the function of ‘Cash-Out’ to withdraw cash, we will collect the information of your name, bank account name, bank account number, mobile phone number or PayPal ID etc. Unless it is required by the relevant laws and regulations for you to provide such information, refusing to provide such information will only result in your not being able to use the specific functions relating to such information, but does not affect your normal use of other functions of Cashzine.

decoder_heading: Updated: 22 February 2020
ident_heading: Updated: 22 Feburary 2020
heading_content_part: iii. At present, Cashzine will not actively share or transfer your personal information to any            third parties outside of Cashzine. Where the sharing or transferring of your personal information arises in some            other situation or you require us to share or transfer your personal information to a third party outside of            Cashzine, we will directly obtain, or verify the third party has obtained your prior express consent to such

decoder_heading: The Information We Collect
ident_heading: The Information We Collect
heading_content_part: The Information We CollectIn the process of using Cashzine service, Cashzine will, in accordance with the following ways, collect            information provided by you during the use of the service or information generated by the use of the service, in            order to provide such services to you, to optimize our services and protect your account security:

decoder_heading: 1.1 When you register with Cashzine service (or login by using third party of account authenrity from Google or Facebook account)
ident_heading:
1.1 When you register with Cashzine service (or login by using third party of account authenrity
            from Google or Faceb
heading_content_part: 1.1 When you register with Cashzine service (or login by using third party of account authenrity            from Google or Facebook account), we will collect your region, nickname, profile picture, and mobile phone number            in order to assist you with completing Cashzine registration and to protect your Cashzine account security.            If you do not provide such information, you may not be able to use our services properly.

decoder_heading: 1.2 When you use Cashzine’s service
ident_heading: 1.2 When you use Cashzine’s service
heading_content_part: 1.2 When you use Cashzine’s service, in order to ensure the normal use of our services, to maintain            the normal operation of our services, and to optimize and improve our services and protect the safety of your            account, we will collect information about your device model, operating system, unique device identifier, login IP            address, Cashzine version number, access network mode , type and status, the quality of your network, equipment

decoder_heading: 1.2 When you use Cashzine’s service
ident_heading: 1.2 When you use Cashzine’s service
heading_content_part: accelerators (such as gravity sensing equipment), operation logs, service logs (such as the information you browse            on Cashzine, or the information about service failure, referrer URLs etc.) and other log information. Such            information is required to provide you with Cashzine’s service and are basic information which must be            collected.

decoder_heading: 1.3 When you agree the Cashzine “Privacy Policy” to use ‘withdraw cash’ function
ident_heading: 1.3 When you agree the Cashzine “Privacy Policy” to use ‘withdraw cash’ function
heading_content_part: 1.3 When you agree the Cashzine “Privacy Policy” to use ‘withdraw cash’ function. According to the developing condition of payment solution from different regions, we probably need to collect your payment receiving information   Inclusive of your name, bank account name and number, mobile phone number, email and PayPal ID and etc. Rejecting to provide such information may result in you being unable to use the Cashzine ‘withdraw cash’ service, but does not affect your normal use of Cashzine’s other functions.

decoder_heading: 1.4 When you use Cashzine with other interoperable software or hardware
ident_heading: 1.4 When you use Cashzine with other interoperable software or hardware
heading_content_part: 1.4 When you use Cashzine with other interoperable software or hardware, providers of such software            or hardware can, with your consent, obtain relevant information that you actively disclose or transmit on Cashzine.            You should fully understand product features and information protection policy of other software or hardware before            granting your consent.
